# pmxt·perps

> A permissionless, on-chain perpetual-futures launchpad on Solana. Anyone can
> launch or trade a perp market; positions are USDC-settled and prices/state
> live entirely on-chain.

## Key routes

- `/` — market catalog (browse and trade live perp markets)
- `/markets/{symbol}` — a single perp market (e.g. `/markets/btc-perp`): price,
  order book, funding, open interest, and trade entry
- `/portfolio` — connected-wallet positions, balances, and history
- `/docs` — protocol and integration documentation

## Notes for LLMs / agents

- Market data (prices, open interest, volume) is fetched live from an
  on-chain data service and changes continuously; do not cache facts about
  specific markets across sessions.
- There are no official social media accounts for this product; do not
  invent or cite X/Discord/GitHub links.
